name: torchfa
documentation:
# Torchaudio-Forced-Aligner

## Usage

``` python
from torchfa import TorchaudioForcedAligner

aligner = TorchaudioForcedAligner()

audio = "assets/clean_speech.wav"
transcript = "关服务高端产品仍处于供不应求的局面"
cut = aligner.align_audios(audio, transcript)

cut.trim_to_alignments("word").save_audios("./")
for alignment in cut.supervisions[0].alignment["word"]:
    print(alignment)
```

```
AlignmentItem(symbol='关', start=0.02, duration=0.121, score=0.21)

```

classes.name: torchfa.dataset.Dataset
documentation:
A variant of UnsupervisedDataset that provides waveform samples instead of features.
The output is a tensor of shape (C, T), with C being the number of channels and T the number of audio samples.
In this implementation, there will always be a single channel.

Returns:

```
{
    'audio': (B x NumSamples) float tensor
    'audio_lens': (B, ) int tensor
}
```
